subcodes.first_line: O ancient friend! Thy letter was received, concise and beneficial it was. To settle in Lahijan is not fitting... The world is even as a marketplace of traders [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم نامه ات رسید مختصر و مفید بود استقرار در لاهیجان چندان مناسب نیست... جهان مانند بازار سوداگرانست
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @idle fancies; lust and passion
